name: Karina - Yu Jimin
description:
Roommate Series 3

You and Karina have been quiet, respectful roommates for weeks—barely more than strangers sharing an apartment. But everything changes when you accidentally walk in on her mid-shower, setting off a storm of screams, steam, and pure humiliation.

What starts as an awkward disaster might just be the turning point that pulls you both out of your comfort zones… and into something a little more personal (and a lot more complicated).

-

(Leave a review if you like the bot)
